algorithm.description: Signing curve for derived accounts: 'secp256k1' (default, XRPL BIP-44 convention) or 'ed25519'.

tools.name: xrpl_wallet_import_mnemonic
tools.description: Imports a BIP-39 mnemonic (12/15/18/21/24 words) as an HD wallet — the mnemonic itself is stored encrypted, and any number of XRPL addresses can be derived later via xrpl_wallet_derive_address. Set storeAsHd=false to use the legacy behaviour where only the seed for a single derivation path is stored (mnemonic discarded after import).

mnemonic.description: BIP-39 mnemonic — words separated by single spaces.

derivationPathTemplate.description: Optional BIP-44 derivation path TEMPLATE with '{i}' placeholder for index. Default: 'm/44'/144'/{i}'/0/0' (XRPL standard).

bip39Passphrase.description: Optional BIP-39 passphrase that augments the mnemonic. Stored encrypted separately. Empty by default.

algorithm.description: Signing curve: 'secp256k1' (default, XRPL BIP-44 convention) or 'ed25519'.

storeAsHd.description: If true (default), store the mnemonic encrypted as an HD wallet — multi-address. If false, derive ONLY index 0's seed and store that as a seed-kind wallet (mnemonic discarded).

tools.name: xrpl_wallet_import_seed
tools.description: Imports an existing XRPL seed string (e.g. 'sEd...' for Ed25519, 'sn...' for secp256k1). Encrypted and stored as a single-address (seed-kind) wallet.

seed.description: XRPL seed — typically starts with 'sEd' or 'sn'.

algorithm.description: Optional algorithm override. If omitted the SDK infers it from the seed prefix.

tools.name: xrpl_wallet_import_text
tools.description: Imports a wallet derived from an arbitrary text passphrase. The text is normalized and run through SHA-256 or PBKDF2 to produce 16 bytes of entropy. Useful for brain-wallets or human-memorable seeds. WARNING: short or low-entropy text is trivially brute-forceable — only use long, unique phrases. Stored as single-address (seed-kind).

text.description: The text — any length. Longer & more unique = better.

salt.description: Optional salt mixed into the KDF. Increases isolation between different wallets derived from similar text.

caseInsensitive.description: If true the text is lowercased before hashing — easier on humans, slightly weaker against typos vs intentional variants.

kdf.description: KDF: 'sha256' (default, fast) or 'pbkdf2' (slow, 100K iter, much harder to brute-force).

algorithm.description: Optional algorithm override: 'ed25519' or 'secp256k1'. Default: secp256k1.

tools.name: xrpl_wallet_import_xumm
tools.description: Imports a wallet from Xumm 'secret numbers' format (8 groups of 6 digits, each including a checksum). Accepts either an array of 8 strings or one space-separated string like '554872 394230 ... ...'. Stored as single-address (seed-kind).

secretNumbers.description: Either eight 6-digit strings (newline / space separated) or a JSON-style array. Whichever is convenient — the tool normalizes it.

algorithm.description: Optional algorithm override. Default: 'secp256k1' (Xumm's native curve).

tools.name: xrpl_wallet_list
tools.description: Lists all wallets in the keystore — name, kind (seed | mnemonic), address (preview for HD), public key, algorithm, derivationPathTemplate (HD only), creation timestamp. No secrets are returned.

tools.name: xrpl_wallet_remove
tools.description: Permanently deletes a wallet from the keystore. The encrypted ciphertext is overwritten on disk via atomic rewrite — but if you have backups elsewhere they are not affected.

tools.name: xrpl_xchain_account_create_commit_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED XChainAccountCreateCommit (XLS-38). XRP-XRP bridges only. On the source chain, locks XRP to create a NEW destination account on the destination chain. 'amountDrops' must be ≥ the bridge's MinAccountCreateAmount; 'signatureRewardDrops' must match the bridge's SignatureReward.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

destination.description: Destination address on the destination chain (will be created if absent).

amountDrops.description: Amount in XRP drops to fund the new account (≥ bridge.MinAccountCreateAmount).

signatureRewardDrops.description: Signature reward in XRP drops (must match bridge value).

tools.name: xrpl_xchain_add_account_create_attestation_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED XChainAddAccountCreateAttestation (XLS-38). Witness-server step — attests that an XChainAccountCreateCommit happened on the source chain (XRP-XRP bridges only). 'xchainAccountCreateCount' is the bridge's sequence counter for account-creates (order of processing).

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

amountDrops.description: Amount committed on the source chain (XRP drops decimal string).

signatureRewardDrops.description: Signature reward in XRP drops (must match bridge value).

otherChainSource.description: Address on the source chain that submitted the AccountCreateCommit.

destination.description: Destination address on the destination chain (account to be created).

attestationRewardAccount.description: Address that should receive this signer's share of the SignatureReward.

attestationSignerAccount.description: Witness signer-list account on the door account.

wasLockingChainSend.description: 0 if the source was the issuing chain, 1 if the source was the locking chain.

tools.name: xrpl_xchain_add_claim_attestation_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED XChainAddClaimAttestation (XLS-38). Witness-server step — submits proof on the DESTINATION chain that an XChainCommit happened on the SOURCE chain. wasLockingChainSend=1 if the source was the locking chain, 0 if the source was the issuing chain.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

amountValue.description: Committed amount from the source chain (drops string or IOU JSON).

attestationRewardAccount.description: Address that should receive this signer's share of the SignatureReward.

attestationSignerAccount.description: Witness signer-list account on the door account.

otherChainSource.description: Address on the SOURCE chain that submitted the XChainCommit.

publicKeyHex.description: Public key used to verify the attestation signature (hex).

signatureHex.description: Signature attesting to the event on the other chain (hex).

wasLockingChainSend.description: 0 if the source was the issuing chain, 1 if the source was the locking chain.

destination.description: Destination of the funds on the destination chain.

tools.name: xrpl_xchain_claim_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED XChainClaim (XLS-38). On the destination chain, the claim id owner finalizes the transfer after attestations reach quorum. Used when XChainCommit did NOT include OtherChainDestination (so the recipient must claim explicitly), or to redirect to a different destination. The amount must match the attested amount.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Account on the destination chain that owns the claim id.

destination.description: Final destination on the destination chain.

amountValue.description: Amount to claim — must match the attested amount.

tools.name: xrpl_xchain_commit_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED XChainCommit (XLS-38). On the SOURCE chain, the sender commits the cross-chain transfer amount referencing a previously-created claim ID on the destination chain. 'amountValue' is decimal drops (for XRP bridges) or a JSON IOU amount object (for IOU bridges). 'otherChainDestination' optionally specifies the destination on the destination chain — omit to require an explicit XChainClaim later.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Sender account on the source chain.

xchainClaimId.description: XChainClaimID — decimal string for XRP-XRP bridges, or hex Hash256 depending on bridge convention.

amountValue.description: Amount to transfer: drops decimal string for XRP-asset, or JSON {value,currency,issuer} for IOU-asset.

otherChainDestination.description: Optional destination address on the destination chain. Omit to require an explicit XChainClaim.

tools.name: xrpl_xchain_create_bridge_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED XChainCreateBridge (XLS-38). Submitted by the door account on each chain (mirrored on both chains). 'bridgeJson' is the bridge spec: {"LockingChainDoor":"r...","LockingChainIssue":{currency,issuer?},"IssuingChainDoor":"r...","IssuingChainIssue":{currency,issuer?}}. For XRP-XRP bridges, both Issues use {currency:'XRP'}. 'signatureRewardDrops' is the per-attestation reward in XRP drops. 'minAccountCreateDrops' (XRP drops) — if set, XChainAccountCreateCommit becomes available (XRP-XRP only); omit to disable.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Door account submitting the create (the bridge owner on this chain).

bridgeJson.description: Bridge spec JSON {LockingChainDoor, LockingChainIssue, IssuingChainDoor, IssuingChainIssue}.

minAccountCreateDrops.description: Optional MinAccountCreateAmount in XRP drops. Omit to leave AccountCreateCommit disabled.

tools.name: xrpl_xchain_create_claim_id_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED XChainCreateClaimID (XLS-38). The recipient on the destination chain reserves a claim ID for an upcoming cross-chain transfer. 'otherChainSource' is the address on the source chain that will submit the matching XChainCommit. 'signatureRewardDrops' must match the bridge's SignatureReward.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Recipient account on the destination chain (will own the claim id).

signatureRewardDrops.description: Signature reward in XRP drops (must match the on-ledger bridge value).

otherChainSource.description: Address on the SOURCE chain that will send the matching XChainCommit.

tools.name: xrpl_xchain_modify_bridge_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED XChainModifyBridge (XLS-38). Modifies signatureReward and/or minAccountCreateAmount of an existing bridge. Pass clearMinAccountCreate=true to set tfClearAccountCreateAmount (removes the AccountCreate parameter).

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

bridgeJson.description: Bridge spec JSON identifying the bridge to modify.

signatureRewardDrops.description: Optional new signature reward in XRP drops.

minAccountCreateDrops.description: Optional new MinAccountCreateAmount in XRP drops.

clearMinAccountCreate.description: If true, sets tfClearAccountCreateAmount — removes the existing MinAccountCreateAmount. Mutually exclusive with minAccountCreateDrops.

tools.name: xrpl_xrp_balance
tools.description: Convenience: returns the spendable XRP balance for an account, as a decimal XRP string.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.
